description: Initialize package.json with npm init and configure for Node 24
steps: Run npm init -y to create package.json
Set type field to 'module' in package.json
Add engines field with node >= 24
Verify package.json structure is valid

description: Create Node version and npm configuration files
steps: Create .nvmrc with content '24'
Create .npmrc with content 'engine-strict=true'
Verify files exist and have correct content

description: Initialize git repository if not already present
steps: Check if .git directory exists
Run git init if needed
Verify git repository is initialized
Run npm install -D husky@^9 lint-staged@^15
Verify packages appear in package.json devDependencies
Verify node_modules contains husky and lint-staged
Run npm install -D @commitlint/cli@^19 @commitlint/config-conventional@^19
Verify packages appear in package.json devDependencies
Verify node_modules contains commitlint packages
Run npm install -D prettier@^3 typescript@^5
Verify packages appear in package.json devDependencies
Verify node_modules contains prettier and typescript
Run npm install -D vitest@^3
Verify vitest appears in package.json devDependencies
Verify node_modules contains vitest

description: Install ESLint core and TypeScript integration
steps: Run npm install -D eslint@^9 typescript-eslint@^8 globals@^16
Verify packages appear in package.json devDependencies
Verify node_modules contains eslint packages
Run npm install -D eslint-plugin-react@^7 eslint-plugin-react-hooks@^5
Verify packages appear in package.json devDependencies
Verify node_modules contains react plugins
Run npm install -D eslint-plugin-import@^2 eslint-plugin-promise@^7 eslint-plugin-regex@^1
Verify packages appear in package.json devDependencies
Verify node_modules contains utility plugins
Run npm install -D eslint-plugin-vitest@^0 eslint-plugin-testing-library@^7 eslint-plugin-storybook@^0
Verify packages appear in package.json devDependencies
Verify node_modules contains testing plugins

description: Install ESLint style and integration plugins
steps: Run npm install -D @stylistic/eslint-plugin@^4 @cspell/eslint-plugin@^8 eslint-config-prettier@^10
Verify packages appear in package.json devDependencies
Verify node_modules contains style and integration plugins
Create .prettierrc with trailing comma, 2 space tabs, no semicolons, single quotes
Verify .prettierrc exists and is valid JSON
Test prettier config with npx prettier --check .
Create .prettierignore with node_modules, dist, coverage, src-tauri/target, playwright-report, *.min.js, *.d.ts
Verify .prettierignore exists
Test that ignored paths are excluded from prettier checks
Create lint-staged.config.js with ESLint, TypeScript, and Prettier checks
Verify lint-staged.config.js exists and exports default object
Test config with npx lint-staged --verbose
Create commitlint.config.mjs extending @commitlint/config-conventional
Verify commitlint.config.mjs exists and exports default object
Test with echo 'test message' | npx commitlint

description: Initialize Husky and set up directory structure
steps: Run npx husky init to create .husky/ directory
Verify .husky/ directory exists
Verify prepare script exists in package.json
Run npm run prepare to initialize husky
Create .husky/pre-commit with npx lint-staged command
Make file executable with chmod +x
Verify hook file exists and is executable
Test hook with git commit (expect lint-staged to run)
Create .husky/commit-msg with npx --no -- commitlint --edit $1
Make file executable with chmod +x
Verify hook file exists and is executable
Test hook with git commit (expect commitlint to validate message)
Create .husky/pre-push with npm test command
Make file executable with chmod +x
Verify hook file exists and is executable
Test hook with git push (expect tests to run)
Add prepare script for husky
Add lint and lint:fix scripts for ESLint
Add format and format:check scripts for Prettier
Add type-check script for TypeScript
Add test script for Vitest
Verify all scripts exist in package.json
Test each script runs without error

description: Create GitHub Actions CI checks workflow
steps: Create .github/workflows/ directory
Create ci-checks.yml with code-check and unit-test jobs
Configure triggers for push (except main) and pull requests to main
Set up Node 24 with npm cache
Add lint, format:check, type-check, and test steps
Verify workflow file is valid YAML

description: Create GitHub Actions Tauri build workflow
steps: Create tauri-build.yml with Ubuntu, macOS, Windows matrix
Configure triggers for push to main and pull requests to main
Set up Node 24 and Rust stable toolchain
Add Ubuntu system dependencies (webkit2gtk, gtk-3, etc.)
Add npm ci, npm run build, npx tauri build steps
Configure artifact upload with actions/upload-artifact@v4
Verify workflow file is valid YAML

description: Verify all tooling infrastructure is working
steps: Run npm run lint and verify exit code 0
Run npm run format:check and verify exit code 0
Verify .husky/ directory has 3 hook files
Verify .github/workflows/ has 2 workflow files
Verify commitlint.config.mjs exists and is valid
Verify lint-staged.config.js exists and is valid
Verify package.json has all required scripts and devDependencies
Create test commit to verify hooks work end-to-end
